transcript: Casey woke up from her nightmare, to find herself in a bathtub with water that had turned red. She gets out of the tub, but can't get up, because the floor was covered in slippery goo. It took her a long time to get out of the bathroom. To make matters worse, there was slime all over the room. The bed was wet and dirty. There seemed to be something under the covers. Casey lifted the covers, and there were orange pellets underneath, the eggs she had laid last night. Casey has turned into a mosquito man. Her nails are starting to fall off, and she is still laying eggs and spitting pellets out of her mouth. Her friends came to her, and were frightened by her golden eyes and panicked in it in the room. Casey kicked in the door, covered her friend's mouth and released blue venom. In a short time, her friend fell to the ground in pain. Her organs were dissolved by the venom, and she died soon afterwards. Another friend comes looking for her. Casey appeared from behind her, sticking out a scorpion tail-like stinger, and covered her mouth and nose. The friend fainted and woke up to find she had been kidnapped. The friend yells and screams. Casey then slashes her neck with his nails, killing her instantly.
